_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn about our personal strengths and celebrate what we achieve.

_source.w: We learn about our personal strengths and celebrate what we achieve.
y: Knowing our strengths builds confidence and self-esteem.
Celebrating achievements motivates us to keep trying.
Everyone has strengths — recognising ours helps us contribute to our community.
eg: We share something we are good at with the class.
We celebrate when we achieve a goal we have been working towards.
We notice when we improve at something and feel proud.
We learn that strengths come in many forms — kindness, creativity, persistence.
We create a 'strengths shield' showing what makes us special.
We tell a friend about something they are good at.
